h1.fontFamily: Satoshi, "Arial Fallback for Satoshi", "Roboto Fallback for Satoshi", sans-serif

h2.fontFamily: Satoshi, "Arial Fallback for Satoshi", "Roboto Fallback for Satoshi", sans-serif

h3.fontFamily: Satoshi, "Arial Fallback for Satoshi", "Roboto Fallback for Satoshi", sans-serif

body.fontFamily: Satoshi, "Arial Fallback for Satoshi", "Roboto Fallback for Satoshi", sans-serif

small.fontFamily: Satoshi, "Arial Fallback for Satoshi", "Roboto Fallback for Satoshi", sans-serif

notes: pageBackground computed as transparent on body element; recorded as #ffffff (browser default).
heroPaddingTopPx 0 - banner image is full-bleed inside a picture element with no CSS padding.
eventCardPaddingPx null - no event card grid present on event detail page.
cardGridGapPx null - no event card grid present on event detail page.
Accent colour #ac4f3b is the Humanitix brand salmon/terracotta used for the logo and primary CTA button.
